summary: Golmok Boss appears as a special guest on Sunny's stream to teach the struggling necromancer how to hunt effectively. Despite Sunny's lack of combat skills and reliance on party hunts, Golmok Boss provides tactical instructions that lead to a successful battle against a group of demon goblins. Impressed by her own progress and his guidance, Sunny gains the confidence to continue training with him to improve her solo hunting capabilities.
key_moments: Golmok Boss joins Sunny's stream to provide a special hunting lesson.
Golmok Boss identifies Sunny's poor combat management and gives her specific strategic commands to fight five demon goblins.
Sunny successfully defeats the demons using the tactics provided by Golmok Boss, signaling a turning point in her ability to hunt solo.
